title: grackle trace event
description: Single runtime trace event emitted by a RuntimeAdapter. Produced by the sys.monitoring tracer and serialised as JSONL. The 'event' discriminator is an open string per ADR-0004 — consumers must ignore unknown values.

TraceEvent.description: A single instrumentation event emitted during script execution.

event.description: Event kind: 'call', 'return', 'line', or 'exception'. Open string — consumers must ignore unknown values.

node_id.description: POSIX-relative node ID from the static graph. Matches a GraphNode id field. Set to the file node id if no function/method node matches the frame.

ts_ns.description: Monotonic timestamp in nanoseconds (time.monotonic_ns()). Relative to an arbitrary epoch — only differences are meaningful.

thread_id.description: OS thread identifier (threading.get_ident()) at time of event.

frame_depth.description: Call stack depth at the time of the event. 0 = outermost frame.
